footer.brandBlurb: AI food safety compliance software for EU and UK food businesses.

home.title: PinkPepper | AI HACCP & Food Safety Software for EU & UK Businesses
home.description: Generate HACCP plans, allergen records, SOPs & audit-ready documents in minutes. AI food safety software grounded in 35+ EU & UK regulations. Start free.

pricing.title: Pricing - From EUR0/mo | PinkPepper Food Safety Software
pricing.description: Start free. Plus at EUR19/mo for daily HACCP & SOP use. Pro at EUR99/mo adds Auditor mode + 2h human consultancy. Save EUR18,000+/year on compliance costs.

about.title: About PinkPepper | AI Food Safety Software by a Food Scientist
about.description: Built by a food scientist with hands-on compliance experience. PinkPepper combines AI grounded in 35+ EU & UK regulations with human food safety consultancy.

articles.title: Food Safety Articles & Insights | PinkPepper
articles.description: A curated library of practical guidance on HACCP, allergen management, food safety audits, and operational compliance for EU and UK food businesses.

faqs.title: FAQs — HACCP, Allergens, Regulations & More | PinkPepper
faqs.description: Answers to common questions about PinkPepper: HACCP plans, allergen compliance, EU & UK regulations covered, data security, Consultant vs Auditor mode, and pricing.

contact.title: Contact PinkPepper — Food Safety Compliance Support
contact.description: Questions about HACCP plans, pricing, or enterprise plans? Contact PinkPepper for food safety compliance support. We respond within 1 business day.

haccpPlanGenerator.title: HACCP Plan Generator - Build a Codex-Compliant Plan | PinkPepper
haccpPlanGenerator.description: Build a complete, audit-ready HACCP plan in hours. AI trained on Regulation (EC) 852/2004, Codex Alimentarius, and GFSI schemes - with optional human expert review.

allergenDocumentation.title: Allergen Documentation Software | PinkPepper
allergenDocumentation.description: Create allergen matrices, menu-change records, and allergen communication documents for EU and UK food businesses with PinkPepper.

foodSafetySopGenerator.title: Food Safety SOP Generator | PinkPepper
foodSafetySopGenerator.description: Generate practical food safety SOPs, hygiene procedures, and operational compliance documents for EU and UK teams.
